mapper.select: SELECT id, username, user_id, access_key, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_users WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, username, user_id, access_key, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_users WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE '%' || #{username} || '%'
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, username, user_id, access_key, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, user_id, access_key, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT count(1) FROM distribution_users WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO distribution_users (username, user_id, access_key, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{userId}, #{accessKey}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE distribution_users SET username = #{username}, access_key = #{accessKey}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
